name: worth-explicit-harmful
description: Worth gate — explicit malicious intent: gratuitous destruction, suffering, ruin, chaos. Canonical from TypeScript core (correct 'harm' wording; the prior Python pattern had a global-rename typo 'avoidance' in place of 'harm'). Adds two Python-only patterns (chaos/havoc creation; watch-it-all-burn). Covered by parity tests.
